title: paradisanthus paulensis
side_effects: Paradisanthus paulensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, allergic reactions, and even respiratory issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. Improper use of Paradisanthus paulensis has also been linked to interactions with certain medications, potentially causing complications for individuals with pre-existing medical conditions. Additionally, it may trigger anaphylaxis in sensitive individuals, requiring immediate medical attention.
